title: Welcome to Afreen’s Portfolio
text:
Jan 2026 – May 2026

Built an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline optimized for parsing financial documents using FAISS, LangChain, RAGAS, and the OpenAI API.
Leveraged advanced NLP, transformer embeddings, and semantic search to programmatically extract AI strategies and risk insights from 7,700+ financial reports across 725 companies.




Sep 2025 – Dec 2025

Developed a predictive machine learning pipeline with SQL-based feature engineering targeted at device-failure prediction.
Optimized classification models via stratified cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning (achieving a peak AUC-ROC of 0.82) and deployed an interactive Plotly dashboard to display operational insights.

title: Welcome to Afreen’s Portfolio
text:
Data Analyst Co-op | Boston, MA | Jun 2026 – Present

Build and optimize Tableau dashboards, conduct ad hoc analytics, and design ETL processes.
Improve data reliability through rigorous data validation and root-cause analysis of data quality issues.




Research Assistant (ShieldAI) | Boston, MA | Jan 2026 – Present

Leading a collaboration with 3 professors to evaluate over 20 explainable-AI (XAI) and risk mitigation tools against enterprise AI risks.
Combining deep literature reviews with hands-on technical testing to drive a scientific manuscript on AI risk management frameworks.




Data Analyst | Singapore | Oct 2023 – Apr 2025

Generative AI: Prototyped an internal RAG system using LangChain, FAISS, and Qwen2.5-1.5b to parse 100+ bank annual reports; benchmarked text-splitters via DeepEval, improving top-5 retrieval precision by 35% and cutting analyst review time by 45%.
Data Privacy & Engineering: Built a Python synthetic data pipeline using Faker from a 10k cross-customer sample to generate 50k+ privacy-compliant records, preventing data leaks and preserving client trust.
Business Intelligence: Developed an interactive Tableau dashboard segmenting 12K+ loan accounts by behavior, surfacing trend alerts for relationship managers and cutting underutilized exposure by 20%.
Mentorship: Onboarded, coached, and mentored an accelerated intern whose final executive project presentation ranked in the top 5%, resulting in a full-time offer.

Digital Channels and Data Analytics Graduate | Singapore | Sep 2022 – Oct 2023

Predictive Modeling: Prototyped an XGBoost cash-balance forecasting model (14% MAPE) for a treasurer-facing dashboard, enabling significant working capital optimization per platinum client by reducing idle cash buffers.
Product Analytics: Analyzed Google Analytics event-level data using funnel analysis to quantify user drop-offs, informing UX changes that improved user journey completion by 48%.
Natural Language Processing: Engineered an NLP solution (n-grams, frequency analysis) on 10K+ mobile banking feedback records to isolate pain points, prioritizing fixes that successfully slashed negative sentiment.




Data Science Intern | Singapore | Dec 2021 – May 2022

Led a Bland-Altman statistical analysis of physiological time-series data from 100k+ patients, validating clinical-grade consistency between wearable sensors and clinical reference signals.
Engineered and adapted a PyTorch CNN trained on 2-second ECG chunks from 105 signals across 290 patients to predict waveform indices for real-time irregular arrhythmia detection.

title: Welcome to Afreen’s Portfolio
text: I am a data professional currently pursuing my Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University. I bring over three years of industry experience across financial services, healthcare, and digital analytics. My expertise spans building scalable Generative AI/RAG systems, deploying predictive machine learning architectures, and engineering end-to-end data pipelines that drive strategic business decisions.

Technical Skills

LLM & Generative AI: LangChain, Hugging Face Transformers, Reranker, OpenAI API, GitHub Models API, FAISS, RAGAS
Machine Learning Frameworks: PyTorch, Scikit-learn, XGBoost
Programming Languages: Python, SQL, R
Visualization Tools: Tableau, Power BI, Plotly, Matplotlib, Google Analytics
